sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73909" key="o(moxoi=nic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-χοῖνιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῐκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who shares the same</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χοῖνιξ,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.643d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
